item.title: Download MiniMeters 1.0.27.210
item.description: MiniMeters is a simple standalone sound meter application for Windows. Monitor your System Audio*, Any Input, or insert the MiniMeter Server Plug-in (VST3/AU/CLAP) at the end of your main channel in the DAW of your choice. Customize the layout in a horizontal bar (perfect for above or below the audio engine of your choice) or pop out into modules to create custom layouts. Features of MiniMeters 6 modules to choose from to build your perfect metering setup: Spectrogram, Waveform,...

item.title: Download PFA Color Suite 7.2.6
item.description: PFA Color Suite is a versatile cinematic color grading plugin (OpenFX) designed primarily for DaVinci Resolve, integrating many color grading tools into a single interface. You apply one plugin as a single effect instead of having to build long and complex button trees for each shot in Resolve. It's geared towards cinematic color grading for feature films, commercials, and YouTube content, including for non-professional color grading users. Core tools included Film splitter...

item.title: Download Red Cad App 3.24.4
item.description: Red Cad App is a software tool designed for architects, engineers and designers to create 2D and 3D drawings and designs. This software is developed by Red Cad, a company specializing in CAD (Computer-Aided Design) software. This is a simple CAD solution for small commercial businesses to design professional CAD for everyone. Features of Red Cad App Draw 2D and 3D: The software allows users to create both 2D and 3D drawings and designs, making it a versatile tool for many...

item.title: Download Devious Machines Duck 2.0.22
item.description: Devious Machines Duck is a dynamic processor plugin designed to control the volume of a track or a specific audio signal in a mix. It is often used for "ducking" effects, where one sound source automatically lowers the volume when another source is present. Ducking is often used in music production and audio post-production to create space in a mix, emphasize certain elements, or prevent frequencies from clashing. Duck has a sidechain input that allows you to trigger volume reduction...

item.title: Download Vovsoft XML to CSV Converter 1.3
item.description: Vovsoft XML to CSV Converter is a dedicated software tool designed to easily convert XML (Extensible Markup Language) files to CSV (Comma Separated Values), XLS and XLSX formats. XML files are great for storing structured data, but they can be difficult to read, edit or analyze in tools like Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets or LibreOffice Calc. This software bridges that gap by converting hierarchical XML data into flat, tabular CSV or Excel spreadsheets that are easy to view, share, and...

item.title: Download Winslop 26.02.120
item.description: What is "Slop"? The term "slop" refers to low-value system components that are often pre-installed and contribute little or no useful function. These elements consume valuable resources and can reduce user efficiency by limiting overall system control. Information about Winslop software Winslop is a lightweight and innovative utility for Windows. This tool is designed to remove unnecessary components in the system, often referred to as "slop," which can degrade operating system...

item.title: Download Disable Windows Defender 3.5
item.description: Usually, we need to disable Windows Defender to prevent it from deleting known files due to false positives. Sometimes, it can slow down your computer or interrupt your work. In such cases, you can easily disable it and enable it again later with just one click. We can also disable this feature (Real-time Monitoring) using the Defender Settings panel, but it will be automatically enabled after a period of time. This tool ensures that this feature is 100% disabled. It also disables all...
